description_long: This is a modern, urban-style couch with a geometric, blocky silhouette and a low profile. The seat and backrest are upholstered in a muted yellow-beige fabric that appears slightly worn, suggesting frequent use or exposure to the elements. The base and rear of the couch are constructed from a dark, metallic-looking material, featuring ribbed or vent-like details on the back and orange accent panels on the sides and front. The seat and back cushions are integrated into the frame, with angular transitions and no visible seams or separate pillows. The armrests are absent, giving the couch a minimalist, open-sided appearance. This design is suitable for public spaces such as parks, bus stops, or urban plazas, where durability and easy maintenance are prioritized.
description: A blocky, yellow-beige upholstered couch with a dark metallic base, integrated cushions, and no armrests, designed for urban public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the couch, integrated seat and back cushions, and orange accent panels on the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, angular profile of the seat and backrest, and the absence of armrests.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the dark metallic back with ribbed or vent-like details and the top edge of the yellow-beige backrest.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the same angular profile and orange accent panel.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat and back cushions integrated into the frame; no loose or accent pillows visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid yellow-beige fabric with a slightly worn, matte texture; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are not visible; the couch sits on a solid, block-like dark metallic base that extends to the ground.
attribute_armrest_design: No armrests present; sides are open and flush with the seat and backrest.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, continuous backrest integrated with the seat; angular and unbroken, with no tufting or division.
